description.value:
Aspect death

Activate 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Effect Your stare causes a creature's flesh to rot and wither away. Target a creature you can see within 30 feet. Your stare deals @Damage[1d6[void]] damage to the creature for every 2 levels the relic has (minimum 1d6; @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save). An undead creature or other creature with void healing targeted this way is instead healed @Damage[1d6[healing]] HP per level of the relic and is temporarily immune to this effect for 10 minutes.
